money_flow_summary: Money flows from travelers through OTAs (15–25% commissions), airlines, hotels, and experiences. AI compresses research and coordination overhead enabling personalized travel tools at scale.

opportunities.title: AI Points & Miles Optimizer
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Connects to credit card + airline/hotel loyalty accounts, tracks all points, identifies expiring points, recommends optimal redemption strategy, sends availability alerts for award seats. Charge $9–$29/mo. 100M+ Americans underutilize loyalty points.
opportunities.moat: Points portfolio history creates personalized recommendations; booking alerts create daily habit
opportunities.first_step: Build loyalty account scrapers (CSV import); create points valuation model; launch on Product Hunt + r/churning
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI understands complex transfer partner chains most people don't know about

competitors.name: AwardWallet
competitors.weakness: Tracks points but gives zero redemption advice; no AI; $30/yr premium; just a database

competitors.name: The Points Guy
competitors.weakness: Content/media, not a tool; monetizes via credit card referrals, not subscriptions; no personalized alerts

competitors.name: PointsYeah
competitors.weakness: Award search tool; limited to flight awards only; no hotel or transfer partner optimization

opportunities.gap: AwardWallet tracks balances but doesn't tell you what to DO with them. A personalized 'you have 180k Chase points — here's the best redemption based on your upcoming Hawaii trip' product doesn't exist.
poc_steps: Build CSV importer for American Express, Chase, Citi rewards statements
Build valuation model (cents per point) for 20 loyalty programs
Generate 'your best redemption right now' recommendation with Claude
Post in r/churning, r/awardtravel — charge $9/mo for automated tracking

opportunities.title: Boutique Hotel Revenue Management AI
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Dynamic pricing + optimization agent for boutique hotels and B&Bs: pulls competitor pricing, local event calendars, booking momentum, adjusts rates daily to maximize RevPAR. Also auto-responds to OTA messages. Charge $149–$499/mo per property.
opportunities.moat: Historical booking + pricing data creates optimization model that improves per property
opportunities.first_step: Register for Booking.com partner API; build pricing recommendation from competitor rates + event calendar; sign up 10 beta properties
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI combines weather, events, competitor prices, and booking momentum into single daily price recommendation

competitors.name: PriceLabs
competitors.weakness: $19.99/mo but only dynamic pricing — no OTA communication, no broader revenue management

competitors.name: Beyond Pricing
competitors.weakness: Similar to PriceLabs; pricing only; no AI communication; $10–$30/mo

competitors.name: Revenue managers (human)
competitors.weakness: $2k–$5k/mo; not accessible to boutique hotels with 10–50 rooms

opportunities.gap: PriceLabs does dynamic pricing but that's only 20% of revenue management. A tool that also auto-responds to guest messages, manages OTA content, and monitors competitive set in one platform is missing for sub-50 room properties.
poc_steps: Build a simple pricing recommendation tool using Airbnb/Booking.com competitor rate scraper
Add a local events calendar integration
Build price recommendation email that sends every Monday morning
Find 5 B&B owners via Google Maps, offer free 30-day trial
